args.code:
import json, pandas as pd
from datetime import datetime

orderitems = pd.DataFrame(var_call_zEdi9ATGvGcf1TXZZZTwaoUy)
cases = pd.DataFrame(var_call_nKldwp1ZcmzTlMnql0VhtauS)

# normalize ids by removing leading '#'
orderitems['oi_id_norm'] = orderitems['Id'].astype(str).str.replace('#','', regex=False).str.strip()

cases['oi_id_norm'] = cases['orderitemid__c'].astype(str).str.replace('#','', regex=False).str.strip()

# filter cases to those linked to these order items
cases_f = cases[cases['oi_id_norm'].isin(set(orderitems['oi_id_norm']))].copy()

# parse createddate and bucket by month
cases_f['created_ts'] = pd.to_datetime(cases_f['createddate'], errors='coerce', utc=True)
cases_f = cases_f.dropna(subset=['created_ts'])

# past 10 months from 2021-04-10 inclusive: 2020-07-01..2021-04-30
start = pd.Timestamp('2020-07-01', tz='UTC')
end = pd.Timestamp('2021-04-30 23:59:59', tz='UTC')
cases_f = cases_f[(cases_f['created_ts']>=start)&(cases_f['created_ts']<=end)]

cases_f['month_start'] = cases_f['created_ts'].dt.to_period('M').dt.to_timestamp().dt.tz_localize('UTC')
counts = cases_f.groupby('month_start').size().sort_index()

# ensure all months present
all_months = pd.period_range('2020-07', '2021-04', freq='M').to_timestamp().tz_localize('UTC')
counts = counts.reindex(all_months, fill_value=0)

# determine if any month significantly exceeds others: use z-score > 2
mean = counts.mean()
std = counts.std(ddof=0)
if std == 0:
    month = counts.idxmax()
else:
    z = (counts - mean) / std
    sig = z[z>2]
    month = (sig.idxmax() if len(sig)>0 else counts.idxmax())

month_name = pd.Timestamp(month).strftime('%B')

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(month_name))

val_args.code:
import json, pandas as pd
from datetime import datetime

orderitems = pd.DataFrame(var_call_zEdi9ATGvGcf1TXZZZTwaoUy)
cases = pd.DataFrame(var_call_nKldwp1ZcmzTlMnql0VhtauS)

# normalize ids by removing leading '#'
orderitems['oi_id_norm'] = orderitems['Id'].astype(str).str.replace('#','', regex=False).str.strip()

cases['oi_id_norm'] = cases['orderitemid__c'].astype(str).str.replace('#','', regex=False).str.strip()

# filter cases to those linked to these order items
cases_f = cases[cases['oi_id_norm'].isin(set(orderitems['oi_id_norm']))].copy()

# parse createddate and bucket by month
cases_f['created_ts'] = pd.to_datetime(cases_f['createddate'], errors='coerce', utc=True)
cases_f = cases_f.dropna(subset=['created_ts'])

# past 10 months from 2021-04-10 inclusive: 2020-07-01..2021-04-30
start = pd.Timestamp('2020-07-01', tz='UTC')
end = pd.Timestamp('2021-04-30 23:59:59', tz='UTC')
cases_f = cases_f[(cases_f['created_ts']>=start)&(cases_f['created_ts']<=end)]

cases_f['month_start'] = cases_f['created_ts'].dt.to_period('M').dt.to_timestamp().dt.tz_localize('UTC')
counts = cases_f.groupby('month_start').size().sort_index()

# ensure all months present
all_months = pd.period_range('2020-07', '2021-04', freq='M').to_timestamp().tz_localize('UTC')
counts = counts.reindex(all_months, fill_value=0)

# determine if any month significantly exceeds others: use z-score > 2
mean = counts.mean()
std = counts.std(ddof=0)
if std == 0:
    month = counts.idxmax()
else:
    z = (counts - mean) / std
    sig = z[z>2]
    month = (sig.idxmax() if len(sig)>0 else counts.idxmax())

month_name = pd.Timestamp(month).strftime('%B')

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(month_name))
